holdings.infoBox: PSCE is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are SM Energy Company stock at 7.01%, Archrock at 6.92%, Kodiak Gas Services at 6.05%, Noble Corporation at 6.04%, and Magnolia Oil & Gas at 5.42%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Energy ETF (PSCE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 / Energy index, a market-cap-weighted index of energy stocks selected from the S&P SmallCap 600. PSCE was launched on Apr 7, 2010 and is issued by Invesco.
